name: Easy Ham and Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pork sausage, chopped onion, and minced garlic until the meat is lightly browned and the onion is tender.
2. Drain off any excess fat from the pan.
3. Add the cubed cooked ham, dried parsley, and bay leaf to the pan. Stir well to combine.
4. Stir in the undrained Navy beans, white wine, and ground cloves until evenly distributed.
5. Transfer the mixture into a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish.
6. Cover and bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes.
7. Remove the cover and continue baking for an additional 40 minutes, stirring occasionally.
8. Carefully remove the bay leaf before serving the ham and beans in bowls with hot corn bread.
